_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: ...we fixed, permeabilized, and stained MCF7 wild type (WT) and BIM KO clone 2E9 cells with HSMCB and found a fourfold reduction in signal in the KO cell by flow cytometry...
details: BIM knockout resulted in fourfold reduction in HSMCB signal by flow cytometry, confirming BIM requirement for PRIMAB binding
